text: Hey, quick question - if I order a pizza and I want it to be half cheese, half pepperoni but then forget to mention I'm allergic to mushrooms, what happens if they accidentally put mushrooms on it? Like, do I just take it or can I get a new one somehow? This is kinda stressing me out.

I am experiencing persistent issues with the software crashing unexpectedly during high usage periods, even after attempting several troubleshooting steps such as reinstalling and restarting my device. I'm unsure if the problem is related to my specific configuration or if others are having similar experiences. My system specs are quite standard, particularly for the software requirements, so I would appreciate any guidance you could provide.

I just can't believe my account was suspended! I've been a loyal customer for years, can anyone explain why this happened? It's giving me so much stress, especially since I need to access my funds for a personal emergency. This feels so unfair!
I want my money back for that order. But I thought it was cancelled. Can I still get a refund?

My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. It was working fine before, so I'm not sure what's going on.
